scrapedName: Vietnam Culinary Journey On Wheels 11 Days

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description: As you arrive at Noi Bai Airport, the excitement of your Vietnamese adventure begins to pulse through your veins. The vibrant colors and bustling atmosphere will immediately capture your attention, marking the start of an unforgettable journey through Hanoi's enchanting landscape. You might feel a rush of anticipation as you enter this culturally rich destination. Our friendly local guide will greet you warmly at the airport, ensuring a smooth and comfortable transfer to your hotel in the heart of Hanoi. You can expect a scenic drive that introduces you to the city's dynamic streets, where tra...

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Food Tour by Motorbike
itinerary.description:
Morning

Get ready for an exciting exploration of Hanoi's vibrant streets and culinary treasures from the back of a motorbike. Your friendly guide will meet you at your hotel around 08:30 to begin this authentic street food adventure through the capital. As you start this memorable journey through Hanoi's maze-like streets, the cool morning breeze will accompany you. At the iconic Giang Café, you will discover the city's famous egg coffee - a creative blend that represents Hanoi's culinary innovation. The unique combination of rich coffee and creamy egg foam will take your taste buds on an unf...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

On the third day of your journey, a new adventure awaits as you head towards the magnificent Halong Bay. Your driver will pick you up at 8:00 from your hotel for a scenic transfer to this natural wonder. The friendly cruise staff will welcome you with warm smiles and refreshing drinks. As your ship glides into the bay around noon, you will be captivated by the breathtaking views of limestone karsts rising from emerald waters. The cruise manager might share interesting stories about the bay formation while you enjoy a delightful lunch prepared by skilled chefs

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Fly to Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning

Our journey continues with a peaceful morning in Halong Bay, where early risers can join an invigorating Tai Chi session on the sundeck. The gentle morning breeze and stunning views will create the perfect mindful breathing and relaxation setting. Your body may thank you for this refreshing start to the day, connecting you with the serene natural environment. After enjoying a hearty breakfast, you will have one last chance to admire the magnificent limestone karsts at around 10:00. The cruise will take you to another breathtaking spot in the bay, letting you capture final photos of th...

itinerary.title: Full-day Discovery Hoi An Countryside By Bicycle
itinerary.description:
Morning

Your culinary adventure begins early at the vibrant Hoi An Market, where you will explore an incredible array of exotic ingredients. The colorful stalls will awaken your senses with fresh produce, unique spices, and local delicacies that tell stories of Vietnamese culinary traditions. You might feel like a local navigating the bustling market atmosphere. You will embark on a 40-minute boat ride along the Thu Bon River, transporting you to a charming village in the delta. A traditional cooking class will unfold under the shade of coconut trees, teaching you authentic Vietnamese cooking...

itinerary.title: Hoi An Transfer to Hue By Motorbike
itinerary.description: Your extraordinary journey begins early in the morning as you depart from Hoi An, ready to explore the breathtaking landscapes of central Vietnam. The motorbike ride will take you through stunning coastal routes, offering panoramic views that will excite your heart. As the morning light reveals the region's natural beauty, you might feel like a true adventurer. Then, you will arrive at the Marble Mountains, where ancient caves and temples await your exploration. The mystical landscape will transport you through layers of historical and cultural significance

itinerary.title: Hue
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Today is free for you to explore Hue at your leisure. For more structured activities, take a look at our optional tours below:

Thanh Toan Village Life & Wet Rice Culture Full Day	FROM US $75 /pax
Glimpse of Hue Half Day - Small Group	FROM US $39 /pax
Best of Hue City Tour Full Day	FROM US $53 /pax
Cooking Class at Thuy Bieu village Full Day	FROM US $88 /pax
DMZ Full Day Tour from Hue	FROM US $93 /pax

Evening

Your Hue adventure begins in the evening with an exciting culinary exploration that will awaken all your senses. Around 18:00, your guide will welcome you with a trad...

itinerary.title: Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Your journey continues with a farewell to Hue as you prepare for an exciting adventure to Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon). You will enjoy a final breakfast at your hotel before embarking on a flight to Saigon. You might feel a mix of anticipation and excitement about exploring a new destination. Upon arrival, our driver will warmly welcome you at the airport and transfer you to a vibrant city hotel in the central area. You will have time to relax and settle in, with opportunities to explore the bustling streets or simply unwind after your morning travel
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Food Tour By Night
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon

Today is your free time to discover Ho Chi Minh City on your own. Alternatively, you may join one of our optional tours for a guided experience:

Long Tan - Nui Dat Battle Field Full Day Tour	FROM US $99 /pax
Ho Chi Minh City Half day - Small Group	FROM US $39 /pax
Ho Chi Minh Vespa Half-day	FROM US $79 /pax
Ho Chi Minh City Tour Full Day with Lunch	FROM US $75 /pax
Can Gio Mangrove Forest Tour by Luxury Speedboat	FROM US $110 /pax

Evening

Your evening adventure begins at 17:30 when professional drivers will whisk you through the vibrant streets of Ho Chi Minh City. You wi...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Discover Cu Chi Tunnels & Mekong Delta Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Setting out early from Ho Chi Minh City, your journey will lead you to the renowned Cu Chi Tunnels. You will witness the historical significance develop as it provides a deep insight into the challenges of wartime survival. At the Cu Chi Tunnels, you will navigate through parts of an incredible 250-kilometer underground network that once housed living quarters and weapon factories. The ingenious tunnel system may surprise you with its complex engineering and hidden entrances. You might even have the chance to explore the narrow passages and experience the challenging conditions soldie...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Departure
itinerary.description: Your final morning in Vietnam offers a moment of relaxation and reflection on the incredible journey you have experienced. You may want to take a leisurely stroll around Ho Chi Minh City, capturing last-minute memories and soaking in the vibrant atmosphere before your departure. Our travel consultants can help arrange a final half-day tour if you desire. The check-out time is 12:00. Your heart will be filled with memories of stunning landscapes, delicious cuisine, and the warm hospitality you've encountered throughout your travels

highlights: Explore Hanoi's street food scene on an adventurous motorbike tour
Enjoy traditional Vietnamese cuisine during an overnight cruise in Halong Bay
Discover local culinary secrets in Hoi An's charming countryside landscapes
Experience authentic night food tours through Ho Chi Minh City's streets
Learn traditional cooking techniques from passionate local Vietnamese chefs
included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights Hanoi – Da Nang and Hue – Ho Chi Minh City
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
